decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (corridor_125th-street-manhattan) already points to a matching registry record — same corridor name (125th Street), borough (Manhattan), and route set (M60, Bx15, M100, M101). The observation source (2013_06_12_sbs_125th_cb10) is already listed in that record's source_ids. Since the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' per the 'never link to your own base_record_id' rule — the observation is already correctly canonicalized.
